188613122.title: File:Bulletin of the State Normal School Duluth, Minnesota Commencement Number, Vol. V No. 2, August 1910 - DPLA - 9a864bbb3a34b7daa2bcc8b7e74b2639 (page 4).jpg

ObjectName.value: Bulletin of the State Normal School Duluth, Minnesota Commencement Number, Vol. V No. 2, August 1910

Categories.value: PD US|Media contributed by the Digital Public Library of America|Artworks without Wikidata item|Information field template with formatting|Digital Public Library of America files missing required SDC statements|PD-US missing SDC copyright status|Digital Public Library of America files missing creator|Media contributed by the Minnesota Digital Library|Media contributed by University of Minnesota Duluth

ImageDescription.value: Duluth State Normal School quarterly bulletin. The August 1910 issue includes the text of the Commencement Sermon by George Gebauer, description of commencement week activities, school news, list of alumnae including the class of 1910, and a photograph of the graduating class of 1910. There are a few photographs of selected campus buildings. The State Normal School, founded in 1895, and registered its first students in September, 1902, changed names several times: State Normal School at Duluth (1895), Duluth State Normal School (1905), Duluth State Teachers College (1921), University of Minnesota, Duluth Branch (1947), University of Minnesota Duluth (1959)

Credit.value:
This file was contributed to Wikimedia Commons by University of Minnesota Duluth as part of a cooperation project. The donation was facilitated by the Digital Public Library of America.

  • DPLA identifier: 9a864bbb3a34b7daa2bcc8b7e74b2639
